summary: Verified new chop-filter + entry_bricks flow end-to-end. Backend: 6/6 pytest tests pass covering login (JWT), /api/state new fields, /api/settings persistence (0.4/30/3 -> reset to 0.30/50/2), and Pydantic validation (422 on out-of-range chop_threshold=2, entry_bricks=99, chop_lookback=1). Frontend: logged in as Yashgadam, Strategy panel renders entry_bricks / chop_filter / chop_threshold / chop_lookback / chop-er-indicator, toggle hides/shows ER threshold+lookback, APPLY posts values, success toast 'Strategy parameters updated' appears, values (3, 0.35, 40) survive page reload from /api/state. Reset back to defaults 2/0.30/50 after test. NO start/stop/order actions executed on the real-money bot.

issues: Minor: entry_bricks <input> max=6 in StrategySettingsPanel.jsx line 34 but backend allows 1-10 (routes.py SettingsUpdate). Not a bug, just a UI cap tighter than the API contract.

critical_code_review_comments: engine.py:1778 exposes chop_er = self._chop_ok()[1] which is round(er,3) OR None while warming up — matches spec and UI 'warming up' branch. Good.
routes.py SettingsUpdate uses Optional Field(ge/le) → Pydantic returns 422 for out-of-range values as expected; consistent with rest of the model.

Settings write path goes through _relay to the leader pod; in a cold/multi-pod preview the very first POST /api/settings can time out with 'No active trading pod handled this in time' (default 12s). Retries succeed once the leader is warm — consider increasing the relay timeout for /api/settings or adding a small retry client-side.
seed_data_creation: None. Test mutates chop_threshold/chop_lookback/entry_bricks then resets to 0.30/50/2.
context_for_next_testing_agent: New test file /app/backend/tests/test_chop_filter_flow.py covers login + /api/state new fields + /api/settings persistence + validation. Frontend testids used: login-username, login-password, login-submit, setting-entry_bricks, setting-chop_filter, setting-chop_threshold, setting-chop_lookback, chop-er-indicator, save-settings-button. STRICTLY DO NOT click START/STOP/Buy/Sell/Square-off/Adopt/Reset on this LIVE real-money bot. chop_er will be null ('warming up') if fewer than lookback+1 bricks — that's expected. First POST /api/settings may occasionally time out via _relay if leader pod is cold; second attempt succeeds.
